participants.name: Garrett DiGiorgio
participants.notes: NFL Combine participant. Per his own quote, he 'only had two tests in terms of the shuttles' at pro day since he did everything else at the combine (5.36 40 at combine). Height/weight from scouting report (6-7, 320). 5-year UCLA player, 49 career starts across OT/OG. Specific pro day shuttle/cone times not publicly disclosed.

participants.name: Anthony Frias II
participants.notes: Bench press of 30 reps confirmed by UCLA Athletics official release and player's own quote. Broad jump of 10 feet (120 inches) per player's own quote: 'My vert, my broad being 10 feet was really good for me. Hitting 30 on bench was crazy.' 40 time not yet available per player quote: 'Still waiting to hear on my 40.' Transferred from Kansas State. Led UCLA with 7.6 yards per carry in 2025.

additional_notes: UCLA held its 2026 Pro Day on March 11, 2026, at the Wasserman Football Center and Spaulding Field in Westwood. 18 draft-eligible Bruins participated in front of scouts from all 32 NFL teams. The event began at 8 a.m. with measurements (height, weight, wingspan) and indoor exercises (bench press, vertical jump) inside the weight room, then moved outside to Spaulding Field for broad jump (on turf), 40-yard dash (on grass), shuttle run (on turf), and 3-cone/L-drill (on turf). Positional drills concluded the day. CRITICAL NOTE: Full numerical results for all participants were NOT publicly disclosed by UCLA or in any publicly accessible reporting as of the day after the event (March 12, 2026). The UCLA Athletics official release and Culver City Observer only reported the participant list and highlighted Anthony Frias II's 30-rep bench press. Frias II himself confirmed a 10-foot (120-inch) broad jump and 30 bench reps in his post-workout quotes but said he was still waiting on his 40 time. DiGiorgio (NFL Combine participant) stated he only did shuttle drills at the pro day since he completed all other testing at the combine. Gary Smith III (NFL Combine participant) also re-tested at the pro day. The 247Sports and On3/Bruin Report Online articles that likely contain more detailed results are behind paywalls. No Bruins are listed in the top 257 of the NFL Mock Draft Database consensus big board; DiGiorgio is the highest-ranked at No. 301. Weather conditions were described as 'bright blue sky and warm sunshine.' Timing method (electronic vs. hand-timed) was not reported. Results may become available in the coming days/weeks through NFL Draft databases and scouting services.
